name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Fork

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N \in Nat

(* Types *)
Fork \in 1..N
State \in {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

(* Helper Functions *)
AdjacentForks(i) == [x \in Fork |-> IF x = i THEN (i + 1) \mod N ELSE IF x = (i + 1) \mod N THEN i ELSE x]

(* Initial State *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in Fork |-> i]
       /\ states = [i \in Fork |-> "thinking"]

(* Next State *)
Next == \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks *)
          /\ \E i \in Fork : states[i] = "hungry" /\ forks[i] = i /\ forks[(i + 1) \mod N] = (i + 1) /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
       \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks *)
          /\ \E i \in Fork : states[i] = "eating" /\ forks[i] = i /\ forks[(i + 1) \mod N] = (i + 1) /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
       \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ \E i \in Fork : states[i] = "thinking" /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ count \in 0..K
        /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

ProducerAction == /\ count < K
                 /\ head' = head
                 /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
                 /\ count' = count + 1
                 /\ q' = Append(q, 1)

ConsumerAction == /\ count > 0
                 /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
                 /\ tail' = tail
                 /\ count' = count - 1
                 /\ q' = Tail(q)

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE
                 /\ readers' = Append(readers, r)
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers
                 /\ writer_active' = FALSE
                 /\ readers' = Remove(readers, r)
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers
                 /\ writer_active' = TRUE
                 /\ readers' = readers
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
              /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers
                 /\ writer_active' = TRUE
                 /\ readers' = Remove(readers, r)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SingleDecreePaxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V
VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, Acceptors, Proposer, Proposers

(* Acceptors' state: [maxBallot: Int, maxValue: V] *)
AcceptorsState == [maxBallot: Int, maxValue: V]

(* Proposers' state: [maxBallot: Int, maxValue: V] *)
ProposersState == [maxBallot: Int, maxValue: V]

(* Initial state: all acceptors and proposers have ballot 0 and no value *)
Init == /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> AcceptorsState]
        /\ proposers \in [1..M -> ProposersState]
        /\ \A a \in 1..N: acceptors[a] = [maxBallot |-> 0, maxValue |-> <<>>]
        /\ \A p \in 1..M: proposers[p] = [maxBallot |-> 0, maxValue |-> <<>>]

(* Proposer's Prepare phase: send a proposal with ballot b to all acceptors *)
Prepare(p, b) == /\ proposers[p] = [maxBallot |-> b, maxValue |-> <<>>]
                 /\ acceptors' = acceptors

(* Acceptors' Promise: respond with their maxBallot and maxValue *)
Promise(a, b) == /\ acceptors[a] = [maxBallot |-> b, maxValue |-> <<>>]
                 /\ acceptors' = acceptors

(* Proposer's Accept phase: send accept request with ballot b and value v to all acceptors *)
Accept(p, b, v) == /\ proposers[p] = [maxBallot |-> b, maxValue |-> v]
                 /\ acceptors' = acceptors

(* Acceptors' Accepted: respond with their maxBallot and maxValue *)
Accepted(a, b, v) == /\ acceptors[a] = [maxBallot |-> b, maxValue |-> v]
                   /\ acceptors' = acceptors

(* Next action: either a proposer initiates a Prepare or Accept phase, or an acceptor responds *)
Next == \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N :
          /\ proposers[p] = [maxBallot |-> b, maxValue |-> <<>>]
          /\ acceptors' = acceptors
        \/ \E a \in 1..N : \E b \in 1..N :
          /\ acceptors[a] = [maxBallot |-> b, maxValue |-> <<>>]
          /\ acceptors' = acceptors
        \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : \E v \in V :
          /\ proposers[p] = [maxBallot |-> b, maxValue |-> v]
          /\ acceptors' = acceptors
        \/ \E a \in 1..N : \E b \in 1..N : \E v \in V :
          /\ acceptors[a] = [maxBallot |-> b, maxValue |-> v]
          /\ acceptors' = acceptors

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE
VARIABLES chunk, receivedChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks, file

Init ==
    /\ file = FILE
    /\ chunk = 1
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ receivedChunks = <<>>

Next ==
    \/ /\ chunk <= Len(file)
       /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, chunk)
       /\ retransmitCount' = 0
    \/ /\ chunk <= Len(file)
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
       /\ retransmitCount' <= MAX_RETRIES
    \/ /\ chunk > Len(file)
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ receivedChunks' = Append(receivedChunks, chunk)
       /\ chunk' = 1
    \/ /\ chunk > Len(file)
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ receivedChunks' = receivedChunks
       /\ chunk' = chunk

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunk, retransmitCount, sentChunks, receivedChunks>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ clocks[i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]
        /\ offsets[i] = 0
        /\ \E j \in 1..N \ {i} : /\ offsets[j] = offsets[j] + (clocks[i] - clocks[j]) \div N
        /\ offsets[j] = 0

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {c}]
        \/ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \in Pages
          /\ c \in allocated
          /\ free' = free \cup {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {c}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES counts


  (* --state Increment
  counts[n] = [m \in Node |-> IF m = n THEN counts[n][m] + 1 ELSE counts[n][m]]
  *)
  (* --state Merge
  counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> IF n = m THEN counts[n][m] ELSE Max(counts[n][m], counts[m][n])]]
  *)
end
*)

(* --state Init
counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]
*)

(* --state Increment
counts[n] = [m \in Node |-> IF m = n THEN counts[n][m] + 1 ELSE counts[n][m]]
*)

(* --state Merge
counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> IF n = m THEN counts[n][m] ELSE Max(counts[n][m], counts[m][n])]]
*)

(* --state GlobalCount
globalCount = Sum([n \in Node |-> Max({counts[n][m] : m \in Node})])
*)

(* --state TypeOK
TypeOK == /\ Node \subseteq DOMAIN counts
          /\ Node \subseteq DOMAIN \Pi(counts)
          /\ \A n \in Node : Node \subseteq DOMAIN counts[n]
          /\ \A n \in Node : \A m \in Node : counts[n][m] \in Nat
*)

Init == /\ Node \subseteq DOMAIN counts
        /\ Node \subseteq DOMAIN \Pi(counts)
        /\ \A n \in Node : Node \subseteq DOMAIN counts[n]
        /\ \A n \in Node : \A m \in Node : counts[n][m] \in Nat

Next == \/ /\ n \in Node
          /\ counts' = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> IF m = n THEN counts[n][m] + 1 ELSE counts[n][m]]]
        \/ /\ n \in Node, m \in Node
          /\ counts' = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> IF n = m THEN counts[n][m] ELSE Max(counts[n][m], counts[m][n])]]
        \/ /\ counts' = counts

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
